title: cyathea cicatricosa
intro: Cyathea cicatricosa, also known as the Scaly Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyathea cicatricosa include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of eczema and other skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or poultices, and are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
